# Micro Scale Experiments

**Summary**: Small-scale laboratory tests to observe mineral interactions at the pore or grain level.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-pratama|PRATAMA, 2023]] performed micro-scale experiments to observe calcite dissolution and precipitation.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Micro-scale experimental results supported the concept of calcite dissolution, though precipitation was not observed in capillary-tube-based experiments. ([[2023-pratama|PRATAMA, 2023, p. 149]])
